input_text: The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. John is a nice man. The bike's length is 10 kilometers. Tom opened the door and the window. Cats are afraid of wolves. The big mouse is strong. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Sandra moved to the garden. John has an apple. The letter was written by Eve. The picture was painted by Leo. The stone was heavy. Mike is a nice man. Catholics can not disappear. A chocolate cake fell. Greg is a bad man. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. Smith, a surgeon, entered the room. Mike has a pear. Mary was given a promotion. "Riga is outside America. Which nice man has a pear?

nl_proof: (3) Which nice man has a pear?
(1) If some X is a good person and X has some W and W is a pear and X is a man then X is the answer  [sentence 3]
(3) If Mike is a man and Mike has some X and X is a pear then Mike is the answer  [from steps 1, 2]
